channel.title: MELI — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on MELI (MercadoLibre) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED MELI (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added MELI in Q4 2025 · 7.2% of portfolio. Building MercadoLibre.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED MELI (+15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added MELI in Q3 2025 · 6.4% of portfolio. Adding MercadoLibre.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)
